case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. ALBERT CHEUNG et al

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-28-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALBERT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALBERT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALBERT $1,329.47 PRINCIPAL, $286.25 INTEREST, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,864.72, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMEHT OF $415.00 DUE ON THE 28TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALBERT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2014
DECLARATION RE: DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 66279008) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALBERT
DECLARATION OF REDUCED FILING FEES PURSUANT TO CAL.BUS. & PROF. CODE 6322.1(C)(1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, ALBERT
